item.title: Get home safe with this one simple trick!
item.description: The mask stays on during sex. Yoinked from a content farm don't know the original creator Shamelessly stolen from Instagram so you don't have to go there
item.dc:creator: Necridos

item.title: Fix C6H Error Instant Pot. Bad Pressure Sensor Switch
item.description:
Flashing Lights and Weird Beep Tones. Uh Oh!
C6H is a faulty Pressure Sensor Switch
Here's what's inside the base. Easy to access.
This is the pressure sensor switch. Remove one Phillips screw in between the two metal switches.
Pull the two separate big wires.. (yours may be Red). And the single black connector with two thin wires in it. All just pull off without tools. Easy.
This is what it looks like after removing the part. Replacement part is $8 on Amazon.
item.dc:creator: jiarby

greetings online friends
about damn time
cool swan though
mmm hmm
justifiable
pasta good
Uncle John's Bathroom Reader series was fire
all hail
you know where that leads...
no need to brag
clever
i only use a weed vaporizer if i need to be more discreet
i love all of you
same thing
that's the main place i do them
as is tradition
finally
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: And how do people ever live without kitties
item.dc:creator: Toredineys

item.title: Finally a little better
item.description: Morning after edit: awards? Somany upvotes!? What? You people are insane! I was just yelling to the void here! Not expecting all this love from it! Thank you all so much. Gave me and my wife a big laugh. We've been reading all the comments and thank you for the love and genuine concern. You people are amazing. I hope you all have a awesome holiday season. This just made my whole month XD. Thank you. Edit: you people are just too much and too awesome. Thank you all for the advice and recipes! To answer a few things though. We have hit food pantries and food drives when things got bad. But I don't feel good about taking that food from. People who are worse off than me. I try to give when I can. For everyone suggesting the @freepizzadude I appreciate it, and i do love a good pizza, but we're weren't that desperate yet if that makes sense. We weren't on the verge of starving or losing our home or anything like that. Things were stretched tight, but we were making it work. I might have skipped a meal or two, but my family didn't need to. And God bless my wife shed doneverything she could with anything we had. It just feels so much better now I won't have to worry as much. And again, you guys are so awesome! Feel free to keep sharing cheap eats recipie ---- Been surviving on 50 to 60 a week for food. Always made sure wife and kids ate, and sometimes a little treat when we could squeeze a few pennies. It's been hard with the holidays. Family gave us a turkey for Thanksgiving and I cried making it I was so grateful. Finally getting our foodstamps after a long, pointless fight for them, we can finally be food secure and lay in some basic to keep like beans, frozen veg and something besides rice and potatoes. Downvote If you want. Just yelling to the void and being grateful I can take care of my family better.
item.dc:creator: MrEon6908

item.title: More than happy to wait for packages for them
item.dc:creator: NappaKnowHow

item.title: Elf Hexia
item.description: TIS THE SEASON!!! Hope your week ended off well!!! Just a few more sleeps til Christmas yayyy! I’m visiting family, but I’m excited! Have any of you got New Year’s resolutions planned? I decided to start mine early and quit refined sugar and delete a couple of social media apps on my phone so I can focus more. Bit random but yeah! As usual the spicy stuff is here: www.patreon.com/miaormoa
item.dc:creator: miaormoa

item.title: Never go full retriever.

item.dc:creator: mocosoft

item.title: It's been a long time coming
item.description: It's the small victories. I heard this day was coming; the day that chrome would no longer support adblockers. I was on my PC a bit before I had to go to work, when I came back and booted up the very first thing my PC did was open chrome all on its own (red flag) and boast about how it removed Ublock Origin because it's no longer supported. I kid you not, I closed the page, Reuters (my homepage) opened up, and a GODDAMN ADVERTISEMENT plastered itself over my entire screen. Nope. Nuh uh. Not ok. Not at all ok. I haven't seen an advertisement on my desktop in YEARS. The very next page I opened up was reddit to confirm what I pretty much already suspected; that my next browser was going to be firefox. Downloaded in several seconds, installed in several more, and... ...Ho-lee-crap. The very first thing it did was allow me to import all my setting preferences and bookmarks from chrome. I cannot justify the joy I am feeling right now in such a small yet grand victory over the BS that has boiled down to the black tar-like substance that sticks to everything and never comes out that is the advertising industry. For the rest of you, it is apparently *that* easy. Just a click and it's all migrated. You don't have to bend over backwards for google and everyone else seems to have capitalized on what is going to be a great migration of users to other browsers by making it that easy; just one button. Suck it, google. *I* will not be going along with 'it'.
item.dc:creator: MisterLemons

item.dc:creator: ChorizoPig

item.title: Independent truffle dog don’t need no human to pay the bills
item.description:
Eisley is a 3 year old Czechoslovakian Vlciak (a purebred dog from Slovakia) who is about as multipurpose a working dog as one could ask. She finds truffles, is a show dog, does sports like FastCAT, NASDA, AKC scent work, is working on becoming a therapy dog, manages birds on piers to keep them clean, and is just the best friend a girl could ask for. I adore her.
This breed has a thin margin of error and people get them just for their looks (and often to pretend it’s not their fault they never trained their dog) so it’s so great to get Eisley out and show people how wonderful these working dogs can be! This was about 6 weeks of training condensed into a minute.
She loves to work even when I try and get her to leave because I am just a big saggy bag of water sloshing through the woods ?
And a very cheap employee to boot!
Truffle tax! This was about 2 hours of work.
item.dc:creator: aviculae

item.dc:creator: ShadowGlizzy

item.title: It was an emotional experience
item.description:
recording of the live stream https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=d_LNSbStu9c
recording of the live stream https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=d_LNSbStu9c Transcript of first few couple of minutes ========== welcome to Antarctica so great to see everybody uhsuper excited that we're live streaming from Antarctica but more importantly it is midnight where we are at right outside of Union Glacier and so the question is obviously everyone can see that it is super bright behind me so the question is the sun still up at midnight or is this a coffee cup costic or a reflection off the Dome so before I give you the answer I want to tell everybody about today today was a very emotional day for me this is something I've been working on for over a year and when I woke up this morning I knew today was finally the day that we were going to fly to Antarctica and it's been a year of overcoming adversity uh just having people tell me things that we weren't going to be able to do and just trying to make it happen so I've been thinking through all of the things that I was told uh over the last year and you know the first one I think was that uh we would not actually go to Antarctica and and here we are in Antarctica uh some people tried to say that uh whatever we were going to do in December was already filmed somewhere else in the world and this will just be a recording so I will go ahead and uh interact with your comments I'm going to do my best with these glasses on I I can't remove them the the snow blindness is very very real it is very very white out here uh M2M uh daylight uh you just saw your comment thanks for all your support this last year on X uh but anyway yeah if you have thoughts you want to share or questions just go ahead and put them into the chat and I will interact with you to just show that this is live so I was told we wouldn't make it to Antarctica here we are uh I was told that uh the trip would be cancelled and uh it was not cancelled I was told that uh we would only be able to go to the coast of Antarctica we wouldn't be able to go to the interior we wouldn't be able to go to right at 80° South which is where we were planning on going and here we are in the interior hopefully you see the the GPS tracking units on our website showing where we're at uh I was told that we could only take a boat to Antarctica not a plane and we flew on a 757 today to get here I was told that uh if we did make it this far we wouldn't be able to have any internet and here we are uh utilizing starlink satellite internet to live stream uh I was told that uh no flat earthers would go and we got two of the biggest flat earthers jeren and Austin to join us uh once they agreed to go I was told that uh anybody who's a big name in Flat Earth is just a shill and they're not real and you'd have to get somebody that nobody knows is flat earther if you really want this to be the real deal and then we got leas Beth uh to join us and uh not not a lot of people knew about her she didn't have a a big presence like uh some of the other people some of the other people do so anyway it's just been a year of just being told you can't and you won't and uh we're just you know coming through and and making this happen uh I was also told that if we somehow did make it here that NASA would make fake clouds to cover the sky so that we couldn't see the Sun and as you can see blue skies almost not a cloud in the sky really
item.dc:creator: psuedon

item.title: Imagine being completely isolated your whole life with the most advanced tech being from the 60s-70s. No concept of the Internet or wifi. then dropped In a Warzone filled with drones. Must feel like a different world
